# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservice-access-control
  namespace: default # Or the namespace where your services are
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service # Target this policy to 'my-service'
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/service-account-a" # Allow traffic from service-account-a in default namespace
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"] # Allow GET and POST methods
        paths: ["/api/v1/data", "/api/v1/status"] # Allow these specific paths
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/another-ns/sa/service-account-b" # Allow traffic from service-account-b in 'another-ns'
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"] # Only allow GET method
        paths: ["/metrics", "/healthz"] # Only allow these specific paths
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service-account" # Allow traffic from admin-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["*"] # Allow all HTTP methods
        paths: ["/admin/*"] # Allow all paths under /admin
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/internal-service-account"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["*"] # Allow all HTTP methods
        paths: ["/internal/*", "/debug"] # Allow all paths under /internal and /debug path
